title: NYC Heat Vulnerability
description: A geospatial dashboard connecting heat exposure, contributing factors, and cooling center response across NYC neighborhoods.

title: NY Dam Safety Dashboard
description: A public-safety dashboard analyzing New York dam risk by age, condition, hazard level, inspection history, emergency action plans, and county-level risk concentration.

title: LeBron Career Dashboard
description: An interactive basketball analytics dashboard comparing LeBron's eras, advanced metrics, scoring profile, and career impact.

title: The Growth of Global Meat Production
description: A data storytelling dashboard exploring how global meat production has grown since 1961, highlighting poultry's rapid rise, livestock-level trends, and the countries leading production today.

title: Unemployment in the US
description: A macroeconomic dashboard analyzing U.S. unemployment trends from 1971 to 2025, highlighting recession cycles, decade-level averages, volatility, and major labor-market turning points.

title: Data Modeling Blog Series
description: A practical writing series explaining data modelling fundamentals, from flat file problems and key relationships to star schema design, using beginner-friendly examples for analytics workflows.
